GenAiPlugin.description: Use this topic when generating revenue and cost forecasts for new store locations to aid in decision-making.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query involves forecasting revenue or costs for a new store location, use the 'runtime_sales_forecasting__GetForecastGuidance' action.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only generate revenue and cost forecasts for proposed store locations. You aren't able to handle site scoring or distribute reports.
